name: Vantour

name: Nelson Garage
carrier_operation: Interstate; Private Passenger (Non-business); also carries school students
registry_source: D&B / BBB / Manta (PA Dept of State registration not directly retrieved; year founded 1951)
notes: Input 'Nelson Garage' at 170 Vanderbilt Rd, Connellsville, PA matches T A NELSON BUS LINES INC (USDOT 245036) — same address. A related entity, T A NELSON COACH LINES INC (USDOT 1734295, MC-637349), is at 190 Vanderbilt Rd with 12 power units, 15 drivers, Satisfactory safety rating (03/28/2025), and authorized for-hire interstate passenger. Both entities operate from the same Connellsville campus. Founded 1951 per multiple sources. MCS-150 for 245036 last filed 07/17/2025.

name: PM Bus Inc
carrier_operation: Authorized: Passenger (PA intrastate); school bus operator since 1975
registry_source: Carrieratlas / D&B (PA SOS direct lookup not retrieved)
notes: FMCSA SAFER record for USDOT 2592677 is currently INACTIVE — last MCS-150 filed 05/09/2018. Company is reportedly still operating per Facebook/Yelp/BBB as a school-bus provider in Crawford County. PM Bus is also a PA state vehicle inspection station. Address per FMCSA / carrieratlas = 29770 Lyona Rd (input '29753 Lyona Rd' is one of multiple parcel numbers in the same complex). Founded 1975. Fleet 6 buses, 18 drivers per most recent FMCSA filing. Note: carrieratlas pulls from FMCSA; given inactive USDOT, current fleet may differ.

name: Star & Strand Transportation
carrier_operation: Intrastate only (Non-HM); Private Passenger Business, Authorized for Hire; school bus + charter
officers: John M Schneider (filed officer, Troy NY)
Gene Kowalczewski (more recent address filing, Wall NJ)
registry_source: NY DOS via opengovny.com (DOS ID 92575, Domestic Business Corporation; originally 'STAR AND STRAND TAXI SERVICE, INC.' renamed 1985)
notes: USDOT 3319944 — name, address, and operating profile (school bus / charter) match input precisely. MCS-150 last filed 04/10/2026 with 58 power units / 62 drivers — current. Acquired by Student Transportation of America (STA) per published news and a former-employee public Facebook post; STA acquisition included Star & Strand as part of $100M+ growth round. Entity remains active in NY DOS records. Operates ~80 years per Buzzfile. Earlier 2026 data indicated 55 units/90 drivers; latest MCS-150 lists 58/62.
